## Description

Please include a summary of the change and which issue is fixed. Include relevant motivation and context.

Fixes # (issue)

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] This change requires a documentation update

## Checklist:

- [ ] I have read the **AGENTS.md** and **CONTRIBUTING.md** documents.
- [ ] My code strictly adheres to the "Node.js Orchestrator vs. Bash Executor" architecture.
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code.
- [ ] I did NOT use semicolons in JavaScript (ESLint will fail).
- [ ] Any native mobile file modifications are isolated inside idempotent `scripts/` bash runners.
- [ ] My commits followed the Conventional Commits specification.
